code_snippet:
def test_api_latency():
    start = time.time()
    r = client.get('/api/products')
    elapsed = time.time() - start
    assert r.status_code == 200
    assert elapsed < 0.2
description: Performance API latency testing: tests API product listing endpoint responds within 200ms latency threshold under normal load.

code_snippet:
def test_concurrent_requests():
    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=50) as pool:
        results = list(pool.map(lambda: client.get('/api/health'), range(100)))
    assert all(r.status_code == 200 for r in results)
description: Performance concurrency testing: verifies health endpoint handles 100 concurrent requests from 50 worker threads without failures.

code_snippet:
def test_memory_usage():
    tracemalloc.start()
    process_large_dataset(10000)
    current, peak = tracemalloc.get_traced_memory()
    assert peak < 50 * 1024 * 1024
description: Performance memory testing: tests memory consumption stays below 50MB peak when processing 10000 record dataset.

code_snippet:
def test_db_query_time():
    start = time.time()
    db.query('SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = %s', ['pending'])
    assert time.time() - start < 0.05
description: Performance database query testing: checks indexed database query on orders table completes within 50ms execution time.
Performance cache testing: tests in-memory cache achieves greater than 80% hit rate for repeated key access patterns.

code_snippet:
def test_page_load_time():
    start = time.time()
    page.goto('/dashboard')
    page.wait_for_load_state('networkidle')
    assert time.time() - start < 3.0
description: Performance page load testing: verifies dashboard page reaches network idle state within 3 second load time budget.

code_snippet:
def test_throughput():
    start = time.time()
    count = 0
    while time.time() - start < 10:
        client.get('/api/ping')
        count += 1
    assert count > 500
description: Performance throughput testing: tests API ping endpoint sustains over 500 requests per 10 second interval throughput.

code_snippet:
def test_gc_pressure():
    import gc
    gc.collect()
    before = len(gc.get_objects())
    run_batch_job()
    gc.collect()
    after = len(gc.get_objects())
    assert after - before < 1000
description: Performance garbage collection testing: checks batch job does not leak more than 1000 Python objects after garbage collection.

code_snippet:
def test_connection_pool_efficiency():
    times = []
    for _ in range(100):
        start = time.time()
        with pool.acquire() as conn:
            conn.execute('SELECT 1')
        times.append(time.time() - start)
    assert statistics.mean(times) < 0.01
description: Performance connection pool testing: tests connection pool acquire and release cycle averages under 10ms per operation.

code_snippet:
def test_serialization_speed():
    data = [{'id': i, 'name': f'item_{i}'} for i in range(10000)]
    start = time.time()
    json.dumps(data)
    assert time.time() - start < 0.5
description: Performance serialization testing: verifies JSON serialization of 10000 item list completes within 500ms time limit.

code_snippet:
def test_image_optimization():
    start = time.time()
    optimized = optimize_image(large_image_path)
    assert time.time() - start < 2.0
    assert os.path.getsize(optimized) < os.path.getsize(large_image_path) * 0.3
description: Performance image optimization testing: tests image optimization reduces file size by 70% within 2 second processing budget.

code_snippet:
def test_search_index_rebuild():
    start = time.time()
    search_index.rebuild(documents=5000)
    assert time.time() - start < 30.0
    assert search_index.document_count() == 5000
description: Performance search index testing: checks search index rebuild for 5000 documents completes within 30 second SLA.

code_snippet:
def test_cold_start():
    restart_service()
    start = time.time()
    r = wait_for_healthy(timeout=10)
    assert r.status_code == 200
    assert time.time() - start < 5.0
description: Performance cold start testing: tests service cold start reaches healthy state within 5 seconds after container restart.

code_snippet:
def test_batch_processing():
    start = time.time()
    results = process_batch(range(1000))
    assert time.time() - start < 10.0
    assert len(results) == 1000
description: Performance batch processing testing: verifies batch processor handles 1000 items within 10 second processing window.

code_snippet:
def test_compression_ratio():
    original = generate_payload(size_mb=10)
    compressed = gzip.compress(original)
    ratio = len(compressed) / len(original)
    assert ratio < 0.2
description: Performance compression testing: tests gzip compression achieves better than 5:1 ratio on repetitive JSON payload data.
Performance thread safety testing: checks thread-safe counter maintains correct value under 100 concurrent increment operations.

code_snippet:
def test_disk_io():
    start = time.time()
    write_and_read_file(size_mb=100)
    assert time.time() - start < 5.0
description: Performance disk I/O testing: tests 100MB file write and read cycle completes within 5 second disk I/O budget.

code_snippet:
def test_queue_drain():
    for i in range(1000):
        queue.enqueue(i)
    start = time.time()
    queue.drain_all()
    assert time.time() - start < 2.0
    assert queue.size() == 0
description: Performance queue testing: verifies message queue drains 1000 items within 2 seconds with empty final state.

def test_render_performance():
    start = time.time()
    render_template('dashboard.html', data=large_dataset)
    assert time.time() - start < 0.1
description: Performance rendering testing: tests server-side template rendering with large dataset completes within 100ms.
